final:
module RefModule(
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input enable,
    input up_down,
    
    output reg [3:0] q
);

always @(posedge clk) begin
    if (reset) begin
        q <= 4'b0000;
    end else if (enable) begin
        if (up_down) begin
            q <= q + 1;
        end else begin
            q <= q - 1;
        end
    end
end

endmodule
